description: Primary entry point. Runs discovery, design, classification, spec normalization, spec review, planning, plan review, and spec coverage audit.

manifest.json.description: Task manifest with task_id, created_at, title, raw_input, stage, classification, retry_counts, blocked_reason, completion_at

raw-input.md.description: Full task description exactly as given by the user

discovery-notes.md.description: Discovery Q&A between planner and user

spec.md.description: Normalized spec with numbered acceptance criteria

plan.md.description: Implementation plan with technical approach, module breakdown, data flow, error handling, test strategy

execution-graph.json.description: Execution graph with segments declaring id, executor, description, files_expected, depends_on, parallelizable, criteria_ids

execution-log.md.description: Append-only execution log tracking stage transitions and decisions

audit-reports/plan-audit-{timestamp}.jso.description: Spec coverage audit report verifying plan covers all acceptance criteria
